title: Hisuian Goodra Battle Guide
summary: A [Steel]/[Dragon] special wall with a 150 Special Defense — [shell-armor] blocks critical hits and the typing grants 10 resistances.
bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Hisuian Goodra is a [Steel]/[Dragon] special wall with a remarkable 150 Special Defense. Paired with [shell-armor] (blocks crits) and a typing that resists 10 types plus [Poison] immunity, it's one of the most specialized special tanks in the format while still dealing real damage with 110 Special Attack.

## Strengths
[Steel]/[Dragon] is an excellent defensive typing — ten resistances, no [Fairy] weakness like regular [Dragon] types, and immunity to poison status. 150 Special Defense plus [assault-vest] makes Hisuian Goodra nearly unkillable by special attackers. [shell-armor] removes critical hit variance from high-power moves.

## Weaknesses & Answers
[Fighting] and [Ground] are the live weaknesses. Physical bulk is merely above-average so [close-combat] or [earthquake] users trade well. Speed 60 forces [trick-room] or slow pivot play.

## Recommended Moveset
[flash-cannon] is the reliable [Steel] STAB. [draco-meteor] is the nuclear option with a SpA drop. [thunderbolt] covers [Water] and [Flying]. [protect] is standard.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[assault-vest] is the default — special wall variant. [leftovers] for sustain builds. [shell-armor] blocks crits; [sap-sipper] grants [Grass] immunity as an alternative. Tera [Steel] stacks STAB on [flash-cannon], Tera [Dragon] boosts [draco-meteor].

## Teammates & Synergy
Cover [Fighting] and [Ground] with [Flying] and [Fairy] partners. Fits [trick-room] cores where slow Speed is an advantage. Pair with physical walls to cover the bulk asymmetry.

## Play Patterns
Switch in on special attackers, [draco-meteor] for a massive damage spike, then pivot to [flash-cannon] or [thunderbolt] to stay relevant. Avoid [Fighting] and [Ground] users — they're the only threats you need to play around.
